overall.description: Game footage from Hogwarts Legacy showing first-person exploration of a gothic potions classroom and professor's office. The player ascends a spiral stone staircase, enters a vaulted classroom with potion tables and cauldrons, and enters a private office with anatomical displays.

events.description: exits spiral staircase into stone corridor

agents.ego_description: walking up the winding stone staircase toward the upper level

entered.detail: worn stone steps curving upward in a tight spiral
rough-hewn stone blocks with warm torch lighting
medieval-style sconces casting warm orange light

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a first-person ascent up a narrow spiral stone staircase. The walls are rough stone blocks illuminated by warm wall sconces. The camera moves steadily upward, curving left, until reaching a stone corridor at the top.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic potions classroom with vaulted ceiling

events.description: enters the main potions classroom from the stone corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through the classroom observing wooden potion tables and brewing equipment

entered.detail: high stone ribbed vaulting with intricate patterns
heavy wooden tables with built-in cauldron stands and glowing embers
iron lanterns suspended from chains providing warm light
tall wooden shelves filled with jars and books
gothic arched windows letting in natural light

segments.scene_description: Entering from the corridor, the space opens into a large gothic classroom with high vaulted stone ceilings. Wooden potion tables with cauldrons are arranged throughout, illuminated by hanging lanterns and natural light from arched windows. The camera moves forward, exploring the room and revealing bookshelves along the walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: professor's desk area near office entrance

events.description: Professor Sharp becomes visible standing near the desk
approaches the wooden door leading to the private office

agents.ego_description: approaching the display cabinet and Professor Sharp near the office entrance

notable_agents.action: Professor Sharp standing near his desk, facing the player

entered.detail: large dark wood cabinet with glass doors containing specimens
heavy wooden door with iron studs leading to the private office

segments.scene_description: The camera moves toward the front of the classroom where a large glass display cabinet stands to the left. Professor Sharp is seen standing near his desk. The camera continues toward a heavy wooden door at the far end of the room, passing various potion brewing stations.

scene_state.functional_zone: professor's private office with desk and specimen cabinets

events.description: enters the private office through the wooden door
camera pans right to examine the anatomical chart on the wall

agents.ego_description: entering the office and examining the desk, cabinets, and wall decorations

entered.detail: large ornate wooden desk with papers and bottles
twin arched windows with diamond panes letting in bright light
framed diagram of a snake or creature on the stone wall
tall dark cabinet with glass doors containing skulls and specimens
ornate red patterned rug on the stone floor

segments.scene_description: Passing through the wooden door, the scene shifts to a smaller, cozier office with a lower vaulted ceiling. A large wooden desk sits before arched windows, while a black specimen cabinet and anatomical charts line the walls. The camera pans to examine the detailed decorations and scientific instruments.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a narrow stone ascent into the expansive gothic atmosphere of a potions classroom and finally into a private study. It begins with a steady climb up a curving spiral staircase illuminated by warm wall sconces before emerging into a stone corridor. As the camera moves forward, the space opens into a large vaulted classroom filled with wooden potion tables, cauldrons, and bookshelves bathed in a mix of lantern light and natural glow from arched windows. The perspective then glides past a glass display cabinet and Professor Sharp toward a heavy wooden door at the far end of the room. Passing through this threshold, the scene shifts into a cozier, more intimate office where the camera pans across a large desk, anatomical charts, and scientific instruments under a lower vaulted ceiling.
